name: constant_plus_toggle_reg_arithmetic
description: Code should include a wire formed by adding a constant to a concatenation of zero-padding and a toggling register, where the sum can never equal a specific comparison value.

name: unreachable_conditional_clock_assignment
description: Code should include a clocked always block where a register assignment is conditioned on a comparison that can never be true due to constant arithmetic on a toggling signal.

name: toggle_register_concat_zero_extend
description: Code should include a register that toggles each clock cycle, zero-extended and used in an addition where the result is compared to a constant that can never match.
snippet: reg a = 1'b0; always @(posedge clk) a <= !a; wire [2:0] b = 3'd3 + { 2'b0, a };

name: constant_nonzero_minus_toggle_reg_comparison
description: Code should include a comparison between a constant N and an expression of the form (N + zero_extended_toggle), which can never equal zero.
